title: German farmer saves 'gay' sheep from slaughter and uses proceeds to help people flee homophobic persecution
summary_full: A German farmer rescues gay sheep, which are often discarded by the agricultural industry.  His Rainbow Wool project transforms these animals into symbols for animal and human rights.  Profits from wool sales and collaborations support the LSVD+ foundation, aiding refugees.  This initiative highlights the naturalness of homosexuality and challenges societal prejudices.  The project continues its vital work, advocating for acceptance and safety globally.
